To ensure the quality of conformance through planning, establishing systems, taking CAPA, and following
principles of QC in Incoming/In-process/ Final Inspections and Tests. To organize planned systematic actions
necessary for meeting the requirements of quality of product service and their compliance.
To carry out inspection at receiving, in process, the final stage, and maintain the record.
Carry Out Physical inspection of Core, Winding, CCA, Tanking, CRGO Slitting, Fabrication,
Painting, Strip Covering, etc.
To implement the Documents System in the Quality Control and Testing Department.
To Plan and Implement Incoming/In-Process/Final Inspection.
To prepare QAP and other Quality-related Docs.
Organize Testing as per the QAP.
Planning and Conducting Transformer for Dynamic Short Circuit, Impulse, High voltage, and
other Type Tests as per IS/IEC at 3
Party Laboratory like CPRI/ERDA.

To Liason with Quality Control/inspection authority.
To monitor the Implementation of CA and PA.
To identify NC and take Corrective/Preventive Action by analyzing measured/recorded data for
qualitative improvement of the process.
To develop new vendors through assessment.
To maintain traceability of product with respect to testing samples and testing results.
To acquire identified measuring devices/ instruments and update QC/ inspection techniques.

Work Experience.title: Project Engineer
Work Experience.description:
To ensure the quality of conformance through planning, establishing systems, taking CAPA, and following
principles of QC in Incoming/In-process/ Final Inspections and Tests. To organize planned systematic actions
necessary for meeting the requirements of quality of product service and their compliance.
To carry out inspection at receiving, in process, the final stage, and maintain the record.
Carry Out Physical inspection of Core, Winding, CCA, Tanking, CRGO Slitting, Fabrication,
Painting, Strip Covering, etc.
To implement the Documents System in the Quality Control and Testing Department.
To Plan and Implement Incoming/In-Process/Final Inspection.
To prepare QAP and other Quality-related Docs.
Organize Testing as per the QAP.
Planning and Conducting Transformer for Dynamic Short Circuit, Impulse, High voltage, and
other Type Tests as per IS/IEC at 3
Party Laboratory like CPRI/ERDA.
Responsibilities of ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018, ISO/IEC 17025:2017
To Liason with Quality Control/inspection authority.
To monitor the Implementation of CA and PA.
To identify NC and take Corrective/Preventive Action by analyzing measured/recorded data for
qualitative improvement of the process.
To develop new vendors through assessment.
To maintain traceability of product with respect to testing samples and testing results.
To acquire identified measuring devices/ instruments and update QC/ inspection techniques.
